ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "employer_type" TEXT /* Type of employer (e.g., SL-gov, self-emp, Private) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (fnlwgt) */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Education number */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married, Not-Married) */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the occupation */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband, Wife) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss */,
  "hr_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the income level */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the individual */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the record (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad, 11th) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Education number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial, Handlers-cleaners) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., North.America, Latin.and.South.America) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "user_role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role-permission relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
